meta.name: adobe
meta.client: Adobe (style reference — not an Adobe deliverable; no Adobe logo/identity)

typography.notes: Source Sans 3 substitutes proprietary Adobe Clean (both Adobe faces, close metrics). Headlines extrabold-to-black, -0.02em tracking at hero size only. Full fluid scale in tokens.css.

logo.notes: No Adobe mark, ever — this system is Adobe-styled, not Adobe-branded. Use a neutral text wordmark placeholder.

notes: Red #EB1000 is the CORPORATE brand red; Spectrum UI negative red #F03823 is a different color for error/negative semantics only. Never mix them.
Red rationing: at most 1-2 red elements per viewport — primary CTA, small badge/accent, or single-word headline emphasis. Never a background, body-text color, large fill, or icon-set base color.
Charts lead with blue, not red (red is reserved; see chart array order).
Primary CTAs are pill-shaped (radius 999px) — the Spectrum 2 signature. All media gets rounded corners (8-24px by size).
Surfaces white/near-white, text near-black (not pure black). Dark sections are a deliberate accent, roughly 1 in 4-6 sections, plus the footer.
Section rhythm: 80-120px vertical padding desktop (56px mobile), content capped at 1280px, body copy columns capped at 672px.
White on #EB1000 is 4.6:1 — AA for normal text; keep CTA labels bold and >= 16px.
Motion: tokens in tokens.css, rules in design-system/motion.md. No ease-in anywhere. Focus rings never animate.
